summary_en: 2,360,000 ordinary shares to be cancelled effective 2026-05-26. Represents 1.74% of issued share capital (ex-treasury). Post-cancellation issued shares: 137,940,000; treasury shares: 4,321,308 (3.13% of post-cancellation total).
title_en: Notice regarding cancellation of treasury shares (cancellation of treasury shares pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: MIRARTH Holdings announced on 2026-05-15 that its board of directors resolved to cancel 2,360,000 treasury shares pursuant to Article 178 of the Companies Act. The cancellation is scheduled to take effect on 2026-05-26. The shares being cancelled represent 1.74% of issued share capital (excluding treasury shares held before cancellation). Following the cancellation, the company will have 137,940,000 issued shares outstanding and 4,321,308 treasury shares remaining, representing 3.13% of the post-cancellation issued total.
